name: Cucumber Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and shred the carrots.
2. Peel and slice the cucumbers.
3. In a bowl, mix together the lemon juice, black pepper, chili powder, butter, and salt until well combined.
4. On a salad plate, arrange the cucumber slices in two layers.
5. Pour the seasoned lemon juice mixture over each layer of cucumbers.
6. Sprinkle the carrots and coriander leaves on top of the final layer of cucumbers.
